title: AI自改进加速Anthropic与OpenAI发布节奏
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "If AI self-improvement, even in a very limited way, is possible, the cadence of shipping both AI products/harnesses & models should go up. This appears to be happening at Anthropic & OpenAI, but not for any other labs, including those that seemed to be catching up last year. https://t.co/gTBEpImYVb" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
If AI self-improvement, even in a very limited way, is possible, the cadence of shipping both AI products/harnesses & models should go up. This appears to be happening at Anthropic & OpenAI, but not for any other labs, including those that seemed to be catching up last year.
2:00 AM · Jun 20, 2026 13.7K Views
